nodes.name: Webhook - Receive Complaint
nodes.notes: Chatbot POSTs here when student raises a complaint.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'complaint_received', ticket_id: $json.ticket_id, message: 'Complaint escalation triggered' }) }}

nodes.name: Prepare Complaint Data
nodes.notes: Normalises complaint payload and computes severity based on student PCM score.

nodes.name: High Value Student?
nodes.notes: High severity = PCM > 85%. These students are priority leads — complaints must be resolved fast.

parameters.subject: =🚨 URGENT COMPLAINT | High-Value Student | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | {{ $json.student_name }} - {{ $json.city }}
parameters.message:
=

URGENT — High-Value Student Complaint

This student has PCM > 85% and is a high-potential lead. Losing them impacts both support score and revenue. Respond within 2 hours.

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
Student{{ $json.student_name }}
City{{ $json.city }}
Target Exam{{ $json.target_exam }}
PCM %{{ $json.pcm_percentage }}%
Severity{{ $json.severity }}
Complaint{{ $json.complaint_message }}
Category{{ $json.complaint_category }}
Raised At{{ $json.raised_at_readable }}
Escalation Due{{ $json.escalation_due }}
Resolution Due{{ $json.resolution_due }}

Action Required (Senior Support):

  • Call or WhatsApp student within 2 hours
  • Offer a personal counselling session
  • Log resolution in GrowthDesk dashboard
  • Notify Lead Scoring Team to re-score this lead after resolution

parameters.subject: =⚠️ Complaint Raised | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | {{ $json.student_name }} - {{ $json.city }}
parameters.message:
=

Student Complaint — Standard Priority

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
Student{{ $json.student_name }}
City{{ $json.city }}
Target Exam{{ $json.target_exam }}
PCM %{{ $json.pcm_percentage }}%
Severity{{ $json.severity }}
Complaint{{ $json.complaint_message }}
Category{{ $json.complaint_category }}
Raised At{{ $json.raised_at_readable }}
Resolution Due{{ $json.resolution_due }}

Please resolve this complaint within 24 hours. Update ticket status in the GrowthDesk dashboard once done.

parameters.subject: =We've received your complaint | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | GrowthDesk
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $json.student_name }}, we hear you.

We're sorry to hear you've had an issue. Your complaint has been received and our senior support team has been notified. We take every complaint seriously and will make this right. 🙏

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
StatusEscalated to Support Team
Expected ResponseWithin 2 hours
Raised At{{ $json.raised_at_readable }}

While we resolve this, please don't let it affect your {{ $json.target_exam }} preparation. You're working hard and we want to support you fully. 💪

If urgent, reply to this email directly.


Best wishes,
GrowthDesk Student Support Team

nodes.name: Cron - Pattern Check Every Hour
nodes.notes: Checks every hour for repeated complaint patterns — e.g. 5+ complaints of same type.

nodes.name: Detect Complaint Patterns (DB)
nodes.notes: Replace with Postgres node. Detects when same complaint type spikes above threshold.

parameters.subject: =🔴 COMPLAINT PATTERN ALERT | Service Issue Building | GrowthDesk
parameters.message:
=

Complaint Pattern Detected — Immediate Action Required

The same type of complaint has been raised by multiple students in the last 24 hours. This is a systemic issue — not an isolated case.

Check Time: {{ $json.check_time }}


Patterns Breaching Threshold (5+ complaints):

{{ $json.breached_patterns.map(p => ``).join('') }}
Complaint TypeCount (Last 24hrs)Status
${p.complaint_category}${p.count}URGENT

DB Query to investigate:
{{ $json.db_query }}


Recommended Actions:

  • Senior Support: Review all open complaints of this type immediately
  • Operations Lead: Log this as a systemic issue in PMO tracker
  • Content Team: Pause any content that references the affected area
  • Legal Team: May need legal/compliance review if faculty-related

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('[GrowthDesk] No complaint pattern breach detected at', new Date().toISOString());
return [{ json: { status: 'no_pattern', checked_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];
